notes: Go ecosystem case with binary test output. A `go test -v ./internal/cache` run fails with a race detector warning and a panic in cache.go:67, producing both stdout test results and a separate race.log.txt binary trace file. The contract must include both go.mod (to ground the Go ecosystem) and the binary log file in the context packet, scope to internal/cache/cache.go (single_file_patch with max_files_to_modify 1), and configure a `go test -race ./internal/cache` acceptance check. Tests Go toolchain representation, binary log files in context_packet, and -race flag in acceptance checks. Synthetic fixture; no customer data. Generated case.
